title: Universal Movie Theater
description:
Place to watch some
Movies in theater mode!
body:
hey ever wanted to watch some movies or your favorite youtuber, here we have created a nice adventure for you and your friends.  this will work on a server to!   



movie night just got more interesting. we are curently building a huge well detailed movie theater.  itll have some other stuff you can do to, like concessions, arcade and many more attractions! 


this is going to be a lite packed mod pack! so even the crappiest pcs should run and be able to join the fun!
